item.title: BP hints at more US Gulf exploration
item.description: Senior vice president tells Upstream the UK supermajor has ‘some other wells in the works’ in the region

item.title: $5.6 billion East Africa oil line edges closer to completion
item.description: Uganda-Tanzania pipeline is four-firths complete

item.title: FPSO set to quit UK field for Falklands
item.description: Bluewater's Aoka Mizu FPSO is set to quit West of Shetland asset for redeployment to South Atlantic

item.title: TotalEnergies and Masdar to merge wind and solar operations
item.description: French supermajor and UAE green power group to create $2.2 billion joint venture in Asia

item.title: BP returns to Kazakhstan with new exploration deal
item.description: UK supermajor to partner KazMunayGaz in exploration of large block in promising oil and gas province

item.title: UK to host talks with 35 nations on Strait of Hormuz transits
item.description: US not part of discussions after Donald Trump warned of two to three weeks of continued bombing

item.title: Full scale of Strait of Hormuz traffic slump revealed after month of war
item.description: Chokepoint traffic remains depressed despite US efforts to paint a rosier picture of global trade

item.title: IEA, IMF and World Bank join forces in response to Middle East war
item.description: Coordination group will maximise institutions' response to energy and financial impacts of ongoing conflict

item.title: New US lease sale points to strong interest in Utah
item.description: Drillers paid over $56 million for rights to explore Utah oil and gas fields

item.title: New BP chief promises ‘clear direction and consistency’ in first day on job
item.description: Meg O’Neill tells employees: UK supermajor has been through ‘significant change and that can be tough’

item.title: Petrobras and SBM agree terms for contracting of Sergipe-Alagoas FPSOs
item.description: P-87 and P-81 floater contracts could be awarded for nearly $8 billion

item.title: Halliburton buys Norway automated driller
item.description: Halliburton scoops up Sekal from Sumitomo of Japan

item.title: Bulgaria offshore exploration hopes dashed as well comes up dry
item.description: OMV Petrom fails for second time with a Black Sea exploration well

item.title: Adnoc chief Al Jaber repeats call to reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Analysts warn of $100+ oil prices for the rest of year as effects of crisis linger

item.title: Subsea7 lands key contract for West Africa gas project
item.description: New pipeline will export gas from Chevron's Aseng field in Equatorial Giuinea to nearby Alen facility

item.title: Chevron signs critical deal to advance Cyprus gas project
item.description: Egypt and Cyprus also initial framework agreement covering gas exports from the Mediterranean island

item.title: Turkish Petroleum starts drilling Black Sea exploration well
item.description: Deepwater Kandira-2 well lies near state-owned player's Goktepe gas find and a Shell-operated licence in Bulgaria

item.title: New Fortress’ Brazil spin-off strikes lease deal for FSRU-based terminal
item.description: No details given of new lease and capacity holder for facility that has been in works since 2017

item.title: Cadeler seeks funding for new foundation vessels in tightening market
item.description: Cadeler pulling no punches in ambition to provide full-scope solutions

item.title: UK takeover shelved following consent delays
item.description: Deltic Energy says deal with Viaro Bidco is off

item.title: Yinson quietly confident about winning major FPSO contract
item.description: Tangkulo project in Indonesia is the prime target

item.title: Tanker ablaze after fresh attack offshore Qatar
item.description: Crew battled fire after vessel struck by two projectiles

item.title: Petronas sees uptick in interest in Malaysia acreage offering
item.description: Middle East tensions spark investor interest in 2026 licensing round

item.title: Petronas sees growing interest in Malaysia acreage offering
item.description: Middle East tensions spark investor interest in 2026 licensing round

item.title: Inpex, Pertamina to ‘proactively pursue’ Abadi LNG
item.description: Duo extends MoU on strategic collaboration

item.title: Inpex and Pertamina to ‘proactively pursue’ Abadi LNG
item.description: Duo extends MoU on strategic collaboration

item.title: Marginal fields could be key to easing APAC energy security pressure, say executives
item.description: Panellists at OTC Asia say marginal and mature fields are growth opportunities for smaller producers in Asia Pacific

item.title: ‘Number of weeks’ to resume full production at Australian LNG project
item.description: Chevron’s 8.9 million tonnes per annum Wheatstone project still out of action

item.title: ‘Cusp of a possible outright energy disaster’: Petronas CEO
item.description: World would come to a ‘grinding halt’ if hydrocarbons stop flowing

item.title: Aussie E&P company outlines 'unacceptable' elements in takeover approach
item.description: Cue Energy raises concerns to Australia's Takeovers Panel
